name: 500 MG Imipenem And Cilastatin Injection IP
about: The 500 MG Imipenem And Cilastatin Injection IP is a liquid drug type injection that is used as per doctors suggestion. This injection contains 500mg of active ingredients that are effective against various bacterial infections. The medicine is made in India and is suitable for storage in cool places. The drug is a combination of two potent antibiotics that help in fighting against a wide range of bacterial infections. The injection is prepared under strict quality control measures to ensure its effectiveness and safety.
